sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['Y', 'S', 'O', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if min(rows) < 50:
            print(f"Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        if b[0][0] < 50:
            print(f"Red dot: ({b[0][0]}, {b[0][1]})")

# Check T-shape right stem
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'P':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Purple: pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
